channel.title: kelseycookcomedy | TikTok
channel.description: Come see me on tour! Get tickets below 🎫 👇🏻 My special The Hustler is on YT!

item.title: WHAT A YEAR 👏🏻 outgrowing my peanut allergy after 15 years might make 2024 my favorite one ever 😂🥜 thank you to everyone who came out to my tour shows this year, listened to our podcast, or watched my special. I’m so grateful and can’t wait to get this new tour kicked off in a few weeks!
item.description:
View on TikTok


WHAT A YEAR 👏🏻 outgrowing my peanut allergy after 15 years might make 2024 my favorite one ever 😂🥜 thank you to everyone who came out to my tour shows this year, listened to our podcast, or watched my special. I’m so grateful and can’t wait to get this new tour kicked off in a few weeks!
#2024 #Recap #2024Recap #Grateful

item.title: Merry Trumpet Tuesday! 🎺🎄 it’s been years since we did one of these! Thanks for leaving your song requests in the comments 🎶
item.description:
View on TikTok


Merry Trumpet Tuesday! 🎺🎄 it’s been years since we did one of these! Thanks for leaving your song requests in the comments 🎶
#taylorswift #merrychristmas #trumpet

item.title: Here’s one from this year that had one of the wildest comment sections ever. Sooo many IUD nightmares. I’m keeping this IUD in me forever like it’s a fake hip.
item.description:
View on TikTok


Here’s one from this year that had one of the wildest comment sections ever. Sooo many IUD nightmares. I’m keeping this IUD in me forever like it’s a fake hip.
#IUD #BirthControl #Removal #StandUpComedy #Nightmare

item.title: Here’s another one from my Top Videos of 2024 recap. No one has ever been more comfortable at a comedy show than this man lol

View on TikTok


Here’s another one from my Top Videos of 2024 recap. No one has ever been more comfortable at a comedy show than this man lol

item.title: Wowwww feeling like the luckiest lady! 🏈 Thank you SO much to the for the amazing gifts and the suite tickets to Monday’s game!!!

#MinnesotaVikings #Vikings #Football

item.title: Sharing my Top 3 most viewed videos of 2024! Here’s number 1 - This was from January and was a WILD way to start the tour 😂

item.title: The Hustler just hit 3.5 MILLION views on YouTube and I’m so grateful to anyone who’s watched and shared it 🫶🏻🥳 you can watch it on Hulu now too!
item.description:
View on TikTok


The Hustler just hit 3.5 MILLION views on YouTube and I’m so grateful to anyone who’s watched and shared it 🫶🏻🥳 you can watch it on Hulu now too!
#mascot #highschool #blackhawks #standupcomedy
